_comment: Hook false-positive exceptions. Add entries here to prevent rediscovering the same false positive each session. Each entry: {id, hook, pattern, reason, addedAt, addedBy, adr?}

exceptions.reason: functions.rs emits todo!() as string literals into generated Rust stubs. These are intentional codegen artifacts — the todo! calls live in the OUTPUT, not in this source file. The grep pattern matches inside string literals, not real todo! invocations.
